Short Description: Shawarma Chicken Thighs with a Red and White Sauce and Roasted Tri-Color Bell Peppers and Charred Sweet Corn over Cumin Rice Pilaf
Long Description: Chicken thighs marinated in our shawarma spice blend with a red and white sauce, roasted tri-color bell peppers, and charred sweet corn over cumin rice pilaf, for a bold, smoky bowl with a bright finish.

Short Description: Miso Garlic Chicken Thighs with a Gochujang Miso Glaze and Charred Broccoli and Roasted Mushrooms over Jasmine Rice
Long Description: Chicken thighs marinated in miso and garlic, finished with a gochujang miso glaze, served with charred broccoli and roasted mushrooms over jasmine rice, for a rich, deeply savory bowl with a sweet heat finish.

Dish Name: Mediterranean Chickpea Chicken Bowl with Green Tahini
Short Description: Pan-seared chicken breast over a dairy-free green tahini bed. Roasted chickpeas, Brussels sprouts, pickled red onions.
Long Description: Pan-seared chicken breast layered over a bed of our dairy-free green tahini — a vibrant, herb-packed sauce blended with parsley, dill, mint, garlic, lemon, and EVOO. Served with roasted chickpeas, roasted Brussels sprouts, and bright pickled red onions, for a fresh, herbaceous Mediterranean bowl with a tangy finish.

Short Description: Braised Short Rib with a Red Wine Reduction and Roasted Mushrooms and Roasted Pearl Onions over Wild Rice
Long Description: Slow braised short rib finished with a rich red wine reduction, served with roasted mushrooms and roasted pearl onions over wild rice for a classic, deeply savory plate with an elegant, steakhouse inspired finish.

Short Description: Salmon marinated in pomegranate molasses, sumac, and Aleppo pepper. Saffron cauliflower rice. Roasted zucchini.
Long Description: Salmon marinated in pomegranate molasses, sumac, and Aleppo pepper, then gently roasted. Served over saffron cauliflower rice with roasted zucchini. Finished with our whipped pomegranate sauce, for a bright, tart-sweet seafood plate with a complex, Middle Eastern finish.

Short Description: Crispy Albacore Tuna Cakes with a Spicy Yuzu Mayo and Pickled Cucumber, Miso Glazed Roasted Carrots, and Blistered Green Beans over Seasoned Sushi Rice
Long Description: Crispy albacore tuna cakes finished with a spicy yuzu mayo, served with pickled cucumber, miso glazed roasted carrots, and blistered green beans over seasoned sushi rice for a bold, Japanese inspired bowl with a bright, umami finish.

Short Description: Pan-seared chicken breast over rigatoni in a sun-dried tomato cream sauce.
Long Description: Pan-seared chicken breast over rigatoni in a sun-dried tomato cream sauce with garlic, Parmigiano, Italian herbs, and a hint of red pepper, for a rich, indulgent Italian-American pasta with a deeply savory finish.

Short Description: Seared Tofu in a Creamy Coconut Tikka Masala with Roasted Cauliflower and Chickpeas over Basmati Rice
Long Description: Crispy seared tofu simmered in a creamy coconut tikka masala, served with roasted cauliflower and chickpeas over basmati rice for a warm, aromatic plate with a bold, comforting finish.

Short Description: Premium rolled oats in organic milk, lightly sweetened with organic maple syrup. Topped with fresh blackberries and blueberries.
Long Description: Premium rolled oats steeped overnight in organic milk, lightly sweetened with organic maple syrup. Topped with fresh blackberries and blueberries.

Short Description: A creamy mango chia pudding layered with coconut cream and topped with fresh mango.
Long Description: A creamy mango chia pudding layered with coconut cream and topped with fresh mango.

Short Description: Tiramisu chia pudding with a sweet tiramisu style cream topped with a light cocoa dusting
Long Description: Creamy vanilla chia pudding layered with a lightly sweet tiramisu style cream, finished with a light cocoa dusting for a rich, dessert inspired treat.

Short Description: Four 2oz wellness shots: Immunity, Endurance, Purify, Clarity
Long Description: Bundle of four 2oz wellness shots — Immunity, Endurance, Purify, and Clarity — cold-pressed daily and made with fresh ginger, turmeric, lemon, and seasonal botanicals.

Short Description: A box of 5 date balls in 3 flavors
Long Description: A curated box of 5 date balls in 3 signature flavors — each bite a dense, naturally sweetened blend of dates, seeds, and seasonal spices, designed as the perfect on-the-go snack.
